MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Documents Lodged By Plaintiff In Opposition To Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LAURENCE O. MASSON, TEL. NO. 1-510-735-9691 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JINNIFER PITCHER OF ORRICK, HERRINGTON & SUTCLIFFE LLP, TEL. NO. 1-916-329-4929 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - HEARING HELD IN CAMERA. Defendant Twitter, Inc.'s motion to seal certain documents lodged by plaintiff Chris Goffinet in opposition to Twitter's motion for summary judgment is granted. (Portions of Exhibit A to the Declaration of Chris Goffinet) The order should recite that it has no affect of any kind on the separate and independent issue of how the jury will see this review. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/hk

MINI MINUTES: Duplicate entry.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Nov-04-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LAURENCE O. MASSON, TEL. NO. 1-510-735-9691 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JOSEPH C. LIBUT & ATTY. STEPHANIE GAIL LEE OF THE ORRICK LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 1-650-614-7447 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT TWITTER, INC.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT TWITTER, INC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication - Defendant Twitter, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternate motion for summary adjudication is granted as to all causes of action except the seventh cause of action for breach of the implied covenant of good faith and fair dealing and, as to the seventh cause of action, the alternate motion for summary adjudication is denied. (See word minutes for details) Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Kelley De Young, CSR #6780 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Filing Certain Documents Under Seal
Off Calendar Oct-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT TWITTER, INC.'S Motion For Order Filing Certain Documents Under Seal is DENIED. Neither Twitter nor plaintiff Chris Goffinet (who apparently desires that the information covered by this motion be kept from the public but did not file any papers in support of the motion) has shown that there is an overriding interest that supports the sealing of such information. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)
